chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Criminal Bail Application No.S-1131 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection. For hearing of main case. 16-12-2022 Mr. Ghulam Farooq Abbasi advocate for applicant. Mr. Imran Ali Abbasi A.P.G. Sindh. MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO, J: - Allegedly applicant was arrested from link road near Dost Muhammad Farm on 18.09.2022 by police of PS Rahuki on patrolling along with one motorcycle and from him 05 kilograms of charas was recovered. 2. Main ground of the applicant is that he had contracted freewill marriage with daughter of one Iqbal Pathan who had registered an FIR bearing Crime No.57/2020 under section 365-B PPC at PS Site Hyderabad, in which he was granted bail on 17.09.2022. He was arrested in this case at the instance of complainant of said FIR from back side of Sessions Court, Hyderabad where CCTV cameras are installed. He took up this ground in his application before the trial Court and moved application for collecting CCTV footages but neither such ground has been considered while dismissing his bail application nor application for collecting CCTV footages was allowed. Learned A.P.G. Sindh has admitted that the trial Court has not even discussed these grounds in the impugned order. 3. Accordingly, in view of above, the matter is remanded back to the trial Court with direction to decide the bail application within fifteen days by discussing all grounds taken by the applicant, and if necessary, shall call for CCTV footages of 17.09.2022 as the learned counsel claims that applicant was arrested from behind the Sessions Court, Hyderabad. 4.

Sindh has admitted that the trial Court has not even discussed these grounds in the impugned order. 3. Accordingly, in view of above, the matter is remanded back to the trial Court with direction to decide the bail application within fifteen days by discussing all grounds taken by the applicant, and if necessary, shall call for CCTV footages of 17.09.2022 as the learned counsel claims that applicant was arrested from behind the Sessions Court, Hyderabad. 4. Criminal bail application is disposed of accordingly in above terms. JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
